sections.paragraph:
παραϰολουϑέω [παρά, ἀκολουθέω] ‘be in close association with’, follow, w. dat.

—a. of signs and wonders functioning in a supportive role, accompany, attend Mk 16:17.

—b. of paying diligent attention to events and stories follow Lk 1:3.

—c. of paying close attention to reliable instruction follow 1 Ti 4:6; 2 Ti 3:10.
